title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.10 - Auto Tune: simplified to just 'At the start of your turn, increase all Tuned by 1' (dropped the 'cards cannot become Tuned' clause and Retain), now costs 3 (2 upgraded), and is now Rare. Venue is now Uncommon. Requires BaseLib.
